# description(options:)

**Instance Method**

Generates a text representation of the group summaries.

## Declaration

```swift
func description(options: FormattingOptions) -> String
```

## Parameters

- **options**: A [doc://com.apple.TabularData/documentation/TabularData/FormattingOptions] instance.

## Discussion

See `DataFrame/description(options:)` for more information.
